zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Andrews於1464年出生在英國戴文艾可謝特時，她的父親Thomas Andrews27歲，母親Joan Margery Clarell18歲。她於1484年與Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1535年7月31日在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Andrews于1464年出生在英国戴文艾可謝特时，她的父亲Thomas Andrews27岁，母亲Joan Margery Clarell18岁。她于1484年与Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1535年7月31日在英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特。

nameMeanings.name: Andrews
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Andrew , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. This is the usual southern English patronymic form, also found in Wales; the Scottish and northern English form is Anderson . In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Polish Andrzejewski , Slovenian Andrejčič, Serbian and Croatian Andrić (see Andric ), and Czech Ondráček (see Ondracek ).
Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Mac Aindreis or Irish Mac Aindriú, see McAndrew .

History: This was a common name among the early settlers in New England. Robert Andrews emigrated in 1635 from Norwich, England, to Ipswich, MA. Even before 1635, one Thomas Andrews is recorded as being established in Hingham. A certain William Andrews was a member of John Davenport's company, which sailed from Boston in 1638 to found the New Haven colony.

variants.name: Andrus
meanings: History: William Andrus came to Boston in 1635 and moved to New Haven in 1639, where he died in 1676.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

variants.name: Andros
meanings: English: variant of   Andrews  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

American shortened form of Greek Andronikos (see Andron 2) or of any other surname based on a personal name beginning with Andr- (from andros, genitive of anēr ‘man, male’), e.g. Androutsos, including their patronymics and other derivatives, such as Andronikidis.

History: William Andros came to VA in 1617 and died there c. 1655. Sir Edmund Andros (1637–1714) was the British colonial governor of several provinces in America between 1674 and 1698, most notably NY (1674–81).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Andrews was born in 1464, in Exeter, Devon, England, her father, Thomas Andrews, was 27 and her mother, Joan Margery Clarell, was 18. She married Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter in 1484, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 31 July 1535, in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Andrews est née en 1464, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Andrews, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan Margery Clarell, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter en 1484, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 31 juillet 1535, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Andrews 1464 in Exeter, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Andrews 27 und ihre Mutter Joan Margery Clarell 18. Sie hat 1484 in England Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 31. Juli 1535 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Andrews è nata il nel 1464 nel Exeter, Devon, England, sua padre, Thomas Andrews, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Joan Margery Clarell, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter nel 1484, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 31 luglio 1535, nel Exeter, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Exeter, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Andrewsが1464年にイギリスデボンエクセターで生まれた時，父Thomas Andrewsは27歳，母Joan Margery Clarellは18歳であった。1484年にイギリスでRichard Blackall Mayor of Exeterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1535年7月31日にイギリスイギリスデボンエクセターで71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンエクセターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Andrews(이)가 1464년 영국 데폰 세터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Andrews(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Margery Clarell(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1484년 영국에서 Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1535년 7월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Andrews nasceu em 1464, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Andrews, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan Margery Clarell, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter em 1484, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 31 de julho de 1535, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Andrews родилась в 1464 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Andrews было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Margery Clarell, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter в 1484 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 31 июля 1535 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Andrews nació en 1464, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Andrews, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Joan Margery Clarell, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Richard Blackall Mayor of Exeter en 1484, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 31 de julio de 1535, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
